_readme: MASTER TRACKER — Check this file before starting any research task. Claim a restaurant by changing status to 'in_progress' and adding your name to 'assignee'. This prevents duplicate work across parallel Cowork sessions.

restaurants.name: Grain
restaurants.notes: Full macro data (cal/fat/carbs/protein) available for Mains. Reference data already converted in grab-and-go/grain_sg.json. Sides/Drinks partially available.

restaurants.name: The Salad Box
restaurants.notes: Calories only published — protein/carbs/fat NOT on their website. Reference data converted. Consider using MyNetDiary SG community estimates for macros (mark verified: false).

restaurants.name: Stuffd
restaurants.notes: Ingredient-level macro data available. Items are build-your-own (Kebab/Burrito/Daily Bowl). Converted to per-meal estimates based on standard combinations. Reference data in grab-and-go/stuffd_sg.json.

restaurants.name: SaladStop!
restaurants.notes: 22 items converted from MyNetDiary community data (medium confidence, verified: false). Prices missing — needs official menu pricing added. Check saladstop.com.sg for any updated nutrition PDF and official prices.

restaurants.name: A&W
restaurants.notes: Check aw.com.sg for nutrition page. Halal-certified. Focus on burgers, waffles, curly fries.

restaurants.name: Jollibee
restaurants.notes: Check jollibee.com.sg for SG-specific nutrition. Halal-certified. Focus on Chickenjoy, Jolly Spaghetti, burgers.

restaurants.name: Popeyes
restaurants.notes: Check popeyes.com.sg. Halal-certified. Focus on chicken pieces, tenders, sides.

restaurants.name: Toast Box
restaurants.notes: Check toastbox.com.sg for nutrition. Focus on kaya toast sets, eggs, coffee/tea. Existing Ya Kun data can be used as a reference for similar items.

restaurants.name: LiHo
restaurants.notes: Check lihosg.com. Focus on most popular drinks (Brown Sugar Series, Cheese Tea). Likely calories only — mark macros as community if not official.

restaurants.name: KOI Thé
restaurants.notes: Check koithe.com/sg. Focus on milk teas, cheese teas, seasonal drinks.

restaurants.name: Nourish Bowl
restaurants.notes: Popular among fitness users. Check website for nutrition. High protein bowl options.

restaurants.name: Eatwell
restaurants.notes: Check eatwell.sg for nutrition. Popular healthy meal prep brand.

restaurants.name: Cheers
restaurants.notes: Focus on hot food items: pies, sausages, rice bowls, sandwiches. Use product packaging / USDA for packaged snacks.

restaurants.name: FairPrice Xpress
restaurants.notes: Focus on ready meals, sandwiches, onigiri, hot food counter. Some items already in ingredients/. Expand to ready-to-eat only.

restaurants.name: Starbucks
restaurants.notes: Official nutrition available at starbucks.com.sg. Focus on: food items (sandwiches, wraps, cakes), popular drinks (Lattes, Frappes). Full macros available officially.

restaurants.name: Old Chang Kee
restaurants.notes: Already in sgFoodDb.ts. No action needed unless expanding menu items.

restaurants.name: Ya Kun Kaya Toast
restaurants.notes: Already in sgFoodDb.ts. No action needed unless expanding menu items.

restaurants.name: BreadTalk
restaurants.notes: Already in sgFoodDb.ts. No action needed unless expanding menu items.

restaurants.name: Gong Cha
restaurants.notes: Already in sgFoodDb.ts. No action needed unless expanding menu items.

restaurants.name: McDonald's
restaurants.notes: Already in sgFoodDb.ts with full macros. Reference DB has 52 items.

restaurants.name: KFC
restaurants.notes: Already in sgFoodDb.ts with full macros. Reference DB has 83 items.

restaurants.name: Subway
restaurants.notes: Already in sgFoodDb.ts. Reference DB has 15 items verified.

statusLegend.in_progress: Being researched — check assignee before starting
statusLegend.partial: Data file exists but incomplete macros — needs improvement
statusLegend.ready: Data file complete and ready to merge into sgFoodDb.ts
statusLegend.in_app: Already live in sgFoodDb.ts — no action needed
